params.name: Rice Cooker
params.description: The electric rice cooker, also known as an electric pot, was not invented by a company involved in scientific research or kitchenware development. Instead, it was created by a telecommunications company. They developed this highly convenient electric rice cooker to help their employees reduce cooking time and have more time for work.
